results.description: Tributes paid after sudden death of veteran EastEnders actor The Independent Tributes pour in after EastEnders and Only Fools and Horses star Peter Heppelthwaite dies aged 59 London Evening Standard Peter Heppelthwaite death: EastEnders and Only Fools spin-off actor dies, aged 59 Yahoo News UK ‘EastEnders’ star Peter Heppelthwaite passes away at 59 The Times of India Such sad news, RIP Peter 💔 facebook.com

results.title: Arbaaz Khan's wife Sshura Khan shuts down troll for age-shaming actor with savage reply
results.description: Sshura Khan shut down a troll who called Arbaaz Khan an 'old man' during an Instagram Q&A the reply went viral.

results.title: Corrie and Emmerdale face more TV schedule changes this week due to World Cup
results.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup is underway and the ITV coverage means Emmerdale and Coronation Street fans will see a different schedule this week.

results.title: Early warning sign of Alzheimer's could be found in your bathroom
results.description: Researchers at the University of Chicago have identified a potential early warning sign of Alzheimer's disease
